name: Mayuresh
Madav
title: Senior Frontend Engineer
profile: Frontend-focused engineer with 6+ years across fintech, payments, and e-commerce. Specialises in building and optimising customer-facing checkout flows, merchant dashboards, and developer documentation portals. Comfortable leading cross-functional initiatives, providing production on-call support, and driving tangible performance improvements end-to-end.

bullets: Optimised the Svelte-based Checkout UI and React Merchant Dashboard, reducing load times and resolving critical UX issues.
Built the Mint Dashboard (Next.js + PostgreSQL + Prisma) — replacing manual Google Sheets workflows with real-time analytics, automated email reports, and Slack alerting.
Developed a Chrome Extension (React, Manifest v3) to automate Shopify private-app creation, cutting merchant onboarding effort significantly.
Led new product initiatives and coordinated across engineering, product, and stakeholder teams to achieve annual renewal targets.
Built and maintained the developer documentation portal using Docusaurus (React + TypeScript) with integrated Swagger UI for interactive API docs.
Developed Python and JavaScript automation tools for quality checks, substantially reducing manual effort across operational workflows.
Enhanced the merchant dashboard with new features using React, JavaScript, and jQuery; provided ongoing production bug-fix support.
Led white-label integrations for aggregator platforms (FAB, Paygate, QPAY, GREZPAY) using custom integration kits. Won Employee of the Quarter.
Maintained and extended web properties across WordPress, Magento, Laravel, and CodeIgniter; built and published the API documentation portal.
Provided technical integration and testing support for payment gateways — TPSL, PayU, CC Avenue, and EBS.
